entries.title: About the Course
entries.content:
Each year in elementary grades, students read biographies of influential people from church history. This course features the stories of Christians from Alveary's modern history rotation for the years (1800-1900).

This topic is included in the following course(s): Bible: Grades 4-6

entries.title: Placement & Combining Tips
entries.content: Those who wish to combine students in Grades 4-6 with younger students should choose either this course or the Church History for grades 1-3. If you have a 6th grader, they could be combined with the 7-8 Church History course.

rows.label: Church History: Grades 4-6
rows.books: Hudson Taylor: Deep in the Heart of China, Trial by Poison: Mary Slessor
